name: Artichokes Cooked in Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim artichoke stems flat and pull off any bruised outer leaves.
2. Cut off top third of artichoke and trim ends of remaining leaves.
3. Place artichokes in a pot large enough to hold them side by side.
4. Pour 1 tablespoon red wine vinegar and 1 teaspoon olive oil over each artichoke.
5. Add boiling water, garlic, peppercorns, and salt until covered with liquid.
6. If artichokes float, place a heavy heatproof plate on top to keep them submerged.
7. Cover pot with a tight lid and cook for about 30 minutes, or until tender.
8. Let artichokes cool in the liquid.
9. Drain artichokes and cut each in half lengthwise.
10. Scoop out the choke from each half.
11. Serve warm, at room temperature, or chilled.
